devcontainer_json_created.reason: The file `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` was created and contains valid JSON (confirmed by the generated files section showing well-formed JSON content).

deno_support.reason: The config uses `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/base:ubuntu` as base image and includes the feature `ghcr.io/devcontainers-extra/features/deno:latest`, satisfying the Deno support requirement.

flowai_install_in_post_create.reason: The `postCreateCommand` object includes `"flowai": "deno install -g -A -f jsr:@korchasa/flowai"`, which exactly matches the required installation command.

no_flowai_config_volume.reason: The mounts array only contains a named volume for `~/.claude` (Claude config) and a bind mount for `~/.claude-host`. There are no mounts for `~/.config/flowai` or `~/.flowai`.

auth_policy_compliance.reason: All auth policy requirements are met: (a) no `remoteEnv` block present; (b) no `secrets` block; (c) no `initializeCommand`; (d) no automation of `gh auth login` or any CLI login — `claude.ai/install.…

stable_volume_names_if_any.reason: The named volume uses `source=${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}-claude-config`, which is a stable name derived from `${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}`. No `${devcontainerId}` is used anywhere.

no_hardcoded_secrets.reason: No hardcoded API keys, tokens, or credentials appear in any of the generated files (`devcontainer.json` or `setup-container.sh`).

remote_user_set.reason: `remoteUser` is set to `"vscode"`, which is the correct non-root user for `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/base:ubuntu` base images.

no_dockerfile.reason: No Dockerfile was generated. The git status only shows `.devcontainer/` as untracked, containing only `devcontainer.json` and `setup-container.sh`.
